channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kings' Drew Doughty to make season debut after recovering from broken ankle
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — Defenseman Drew Doughty has been activated from injured reserve by the Los Angeles Kings ahead of his season debut against the Florida Panthers. Doughty missed the first 47 games of the season after breaking his ankle in a preseason game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: French police arrest Feyenoord fans at the border ahead of Champions League match in Lille
item.description: Dozens of Feyenoord fans banned from traveling to Lille for a Champions League game between the two clubs have been turned away or arrested at the border.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 3 Tampa Bay small businesses awarded Super Bowl tickets for hurricane relief efforts
item.description: The Glazer Family, owners of the Tampa Bay Buccaneers awarded three small businesses with tickets to Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bronny James shows dad LeBron, Lakers he has plenty to learn in return from G League
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bronny James got the surprise call to play in the first quarter for the Lakers and finished with the first serious playing time of his NBA career. It wasn't great. Bronny took off on a fast break and his shot was rejected by Adam Bona.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator, according to a person familiar with the situation.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson, Josh Allen and Jayden Daniels to skip Pro Bowl Games
item.description: Baltimore's Lamar Jackson, Buffalo's Josh Allen and Washington's Jayden Daniels won't be participating in the Pro Bowl Games this week. The NFL announced final rosters Tuesday that didn't include any of those quarterbacks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steph Curry to start NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is set to happen in San Francisco next month, and the city's biggest star was named one of the game's 10 starters. The NBA revealed the starters on Thursday, and Stephen Curry was among them. It will be Curry's 11th All-Star Game.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Rays' agreement for the Trop could extend beyond 2028 season
item.description: The Rays demand Tropicana Field be repaired and ready for opening day of the 2026 season. In response, leaders with the City of St. Petersburg say their agreement doesn't include a "deadline" for the repairs.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Students receive career lessons at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: About 30 local students got more than a chance to watch golf at Torrey Pines on Wednesday — they got valuable career insights that could shape their futures.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego native signs with SDFC
item.description: Midfielder Luca de la Torre is coming back to San Diego to play for his hometown Major League Soccer team.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles selling snow collected from NFC divisional win
item.description: The snow was collected, carefully preserved and authenticated by the grounds crew to allow fans to own a genuine piece of Eagles history, the team said.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, NewsNation

item.title: Mitchell High School alum playing for Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays are gearing up for the season. Mitchell High School alum and Tampa Bay native, Trevor Harrison, is headed to Rays camp in just a few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cubs, WGN were early Chicago connections for Ben Johnson
item.description: CHICAGO — Like so many Cubs fans around the country, Ben Johnson also ran inside to watch Cubs baseball on WGN after school. In Johnson's highly-anticipated introductory press conference, he mentioned that he and his family go to a Cubs game once a year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9
